---
title: Meet the teaching team
comments: false
listing:
  type: grid
  grid-columns: 4
  image-height: 250px
  categories: false
  contents:
    - "people/*.qmd"
---

::: {.aside}
![](images/Landscape__1.Col_Pos_CBDRH.jpg)
:::



<style>

.quarto-grid-item {
  transition: transform 0.2s ease; /* smooth animation */
}


.quarto-grid-item:hover {
transform: scale(1.05); /* increase size by 5% */
}


</style>
